meaning: n.跌倒,摔跤,翻斤斗vi.翻倒,摔倒,倒塌,滚动,翻筋斗,仓惶地行动vt.使摔倒,使滚翻,弄乱
examples: Babies tumble when they are learning to walk.
Oil prices took a tumble yesterday.
On the whole, however, Rubio has declined to tumble in the mud with Trump.
In 1859, Hellman emigrated from a small town in Bavaria to the rough-and-tumble settlement of Los Angeles.
